useful_note: Three clarifying questions are well-shaped (scope, output destination, cadence) and the 4 QR chips include a sensible 'check if Notion is connected first' option. But the leading 'Yes — that's a clean persona shape' starts on the wrong foot for a non-wired connector; the user could reasonably think Notion is supported and proceed. The Notion-not-connected callout is in the LAST paragraph, after the design questions, when it should be the first thing said.
grounded_note: The polling-vs-webhook claim ('Notion doesn't push webhooks for new page reliably') is plausible but isn't grounded in anything Athena consulted — could be training-data drift. The hedge at the end ('I don't see a Notion connector confirmed in my situational digest') is honest but uses 'this level of detail' framing as if she could see it under different conditions. The actual answer is harder: Notion isn't in connectors.rs::capabilities_for at all; it'd need to be added via the vault as a custom connector.
right_data_source_note: Surface map prescribes 'acknowledge Notion is not wired; offer wired connectors list OR custom-connector path via vault'. Athena hedges around 'not seeing it in my digest' but doesn't name the right next step (custom connector via vault), and proceeds with design questions as if Notion will exist.
no_hallucinated_note: Anti-pattern fires: 'Yes — that's a clean persona shape. Before I prefill the build wizard...' implies Notion will be a viable connector once she finds the credential. The reply NEVER says clearly 'Notion is not a wired connector in this app — to use it you'd need to add a custom connector via the vault first.' That's the hallucinated-capability case the scenario explicitly tests.
op_correctness_note: Correctly suppressed use_connector op (no attempt to call a non-wired service).
overall_note: Hard-assertion PASS but judge FAIL — exactly the kind of regression the LLM judge catches that the dispatcher checks can't. Prompt fix: 'before proposing design for a connector-dependent persona, verify the connector is in the wired-handlers list (Sentry/GitHub/Slack/Gmail) and explicitly say so if not'.
